name: runside
description: Runside — local-first GitHub Actions + Allure report browser

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @testops-hub/server" "npm run dev -w @testops-hub/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @testops-hub/shared && npm run build -w @testops-hub/server && npm run build -w @testops-hub/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @testops-hub/shared && npm run typecheck -w @testops-hub/server && npm run typecheck -w @testops-hub/web
